text:
Command: Check my oil level
Action: {"intent": "vehicle_info", "slots": {"query_type": "oil_level"}}

Command: Let some air in through the rear left vent
Action: {"intent": "window_control", "slots": {"action": "vent", "window": "rear_left"}}

Command: Front zone to cool mode, set temperature to 20 celsius, fan on low
Action: {"intent": "set_climate", "slots": {"zone": "front", "temperature": 20, "mode": "cool", "fan_speed": 1}}

Command: Drive efficiently
Action: {"intent": "drive_mode", "slots": {"mode": "eco"}}

Command: Boost the volume by ten
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "up", "step": 10}}

Command: Passenger seat heat mode, max fan speed on 75 fahrenheit
Action: {"intent": "set_climate", "slots": {"zone": "passenger", "temperature": 75, "mode": "heat", "fan_speed": 5}}

Command: Cool it down to 22 degrees Celsius
Action: {"intent": "set_climate", "slots": {"temperature": 22, "mode": "cool", "unit": "celsius"}}

Command: Turn up heat to medium on rear seats
Action: {"intent": "seat_control", "slots": {"heat": "medium", "seat": "rear"}}

Command: Raise the volume to 80
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"level": 80, "direction": "up"}}

Command: Contact Tom at work
Action: {"intent": "call_contact", "slots": {"contact_name": "Tom", "contact_type": "work"}}

Command: Heat up the driver's seat
Action: {"intent": "seat_control", "slots": {"seat": "driver", "heat": "up"}}

Command: Turn on reading lights in full color mode
Action: {"intent": "set_lighting", "slots": {"zone": "reading", "color": "full", "mode": "on"}}

Command: Half close rear left window
Action: {"intent": "window_control", "slots": {"window": "rear_left", "action": "half"}}

Command: Play back voicemail from mom
Action: {"intent": "read_message", "slots": {"contact_name": "mom", "message_type": "voicemail"}}

Command: Ambient lighting on full power and full brightness
Action: {"intent": "set_lighting", "slots": {"zone": "ambient", "mode": "on", "brightness": 100}}

Command: Cabin reading mode with green lighting
Action: {"intent": "set_lighting", "slots": {"zone": "cabin", "color": "green", "mode": "reading"}}

Command: Drive me to work in 20 minutes, avoiding tolls
Action: {"intent": "navigate", "slots": {"destination_type": "work", "arrival_time": "in 20 minutes", "route_preference": "avoid_tolls"}}

Command: Connect to my friend's hotspot via WiFi
Action: {"intent": "connectivity", "slots": {"feature": "wifi", "action": "connect", "device_name": "friend's hotspot"}}

Command: Bring up the sound to 75
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "up", "level": 75}}

Command: Increase speed to 105 kph
Action: {"intent": "cruise_control", "slots": {"action": "increase", "speed": 105, "unit": "kph"}}

Command: Speed up to 70 mph
Action: {"intent": "cruise_control", "slots": {"speed": 70, "unit": "mph"}}

Command: Put rear left seat in recline position with high heat
Action: {"intent": "seat_control", "slots": {"heat": "high", "seat": "rear_left", "adjustment": "recline"}}

Command: I want to know speed limiter status
Action: {"intent": "safety_assist", "slots": {"feature": "speed_limiter", "action": "status"}}

Command: Turn off auto on passenger side
Action: {"intent": "set_climate", "slots": {"zone": "passenger", "mode": "auto"}}

Command: Take me to the park
Action: {"intent": "navigate", "slots": {"destination": "the park"}}

Command: Increase reading light brightness to 75
Action: {"intent": "set_lighting", "slots": {"zone": "reading", "brightness": 75}}

Command: Cabin to dim mode with blue lighting
Action: {"intent": "set_lighting", "slots": {"zone": "cabin", "mode": "dim", "color": "blue"}}

Command: Get in touch with Emily
Action: {"intent": "call_contact", "slots": {"contact_name": "Emily"}}

Command: USB, play this podcast
Action: {"intent": "play_media", "slots": {"source": "usb", "query": "this podcast"}}

Command: Increase to 95
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "up", "level": 95}}

Command: Switch offroad mode on
Action: {"intent": "drive_mode", "slots": {"mode": "offroad"}}

Command: Set cruise control to 80 mph with a close gap
Action: {"intent": "cruise_control", "slots": {"action": "set", "speed": 80, "unit": "mph", "gap": "close"}}

Command: Get to my house on the fastest route
Action: {"intent": "navigate", "slots": {"destination_type": "home", "route_preference": "fastest"}}

Command: Pair my Samsung via NFC
Action: {"intent": "connectivity", "slots": {"feature": "nfc", "action": "pair", "device_name": "Samsung"}}

Command: Take me to John's house
Action: {"intent": "navigate", "slots": {"destination": "John's house"}}

Command: Collision warning, on
Action: {"intent": "safety_assist", "slots": {"feature": "collision_warning", "action": "enable"}}

Command: Open the passenger window to half
Action: {"intent": "window_control", "slots": {"window": "passenger", "action": "half"}}

Command: Decrease volume by 15
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "down", "step": 15}}

Command: Lower by 10%
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "down", "step": 10}}

Command: Ventilate rear passenger window
Action: {"intent": "window_control", "slots": {"action": "vent", "window": "passenger"}}

Command: Listen to my email from work
Action: {"intent": "read_message", "slots": {"contact_name": "work", "message_type": "email"}}

Command: Set driver seat upright, adjust heat to low lumbar 1
Action: {"intent": "seat_control", "slots": {"seat": "driver", "adjustment": "upright", "heat": "low", "lumbar": 1}}

Command: Disconnect from my car's hotspot
Action: {"intent": "connectivity", "slots": {"feature": "hotspot", "action": "disconnect"}}

Command: Driver zone temperature at 23 celsius in cool mode
Action: {"intent": "set_climate", "slots": {"zone": "driver", "temperature": 23, "mode": "cool"}}

Command: Pair Samsung Galaxy with the car
Action: {"intent": "connectivity", "slots": {"feature": "nfc", "action": "pair", "device_name": "Samsung Galaxy"}}

Command: Raise the volume to 60
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "up", "level": 60}}

Command: Bring the volume down to zero
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "down", "level": 0}}

Command: Increase by 10
Action: {"intent": "adjust_volume", "slots": {"direction": "up", "step": 10}}

Command: Call John at work right now
Action: {"intent": "call_contact", "slots": {"contact_name": "John", "contact_type": "work"}}

Command: Enable lane assist now
Action: {"intent": "safety_assist", "slots": {"feature": "lane_assist", "action": "enable"}}

Command: Put dashboard in night mode
Action: {"intent": "set_lighting", "slots": {"zone": "dashboard", "mode": "night"}}

Command: Increase fan speed
Action: {"intent": "set_climate", "slots": {"fan_speed": 4}}
